positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_test
% SZS output start Saturation.
% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define podcast(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define novel(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg_test
% SZS output start Proof for neg_test
1. ! [X0] : (podcast(X0) => ~novel(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. podcast(family_secrets) [input(axiom)]
3. ~novel(family_secrets) [input(conjecture)]
4. ~~novel(family_secrets) [negated conjecture 3]
5. novel(family_secrets) [flattening 4]
6. ! [X0] : (~novel(X0) | ~podcast(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
7. ~novel(X0) | ~podcast(X0) [cnf transformation 6]
8. podcast(family_secrets) [cnf transformation 2]
9. novel(family_secrets) [cnf transformation 5]
10. ~podcast(family_secrets) [resolution 7,9]
11. $false [forward subsumption resolution 10,8]
% SZS output end Proof for neg_test
% Termination reason: Refutation
